title: Agent Occupancy and Schedule Adherence
industry: Cross-industry omnichannel customer engagement and workforce-managed contact centers
dataSources: Unified lane `index=business` with sourcetypes normalized by your ingestion tier ‚Äî examples: **`ccaas:agent_state`** (fields emitted from vendor REST pulls such as **NICE CXone** OAuth2 caller hitting **`/incontactapi/services/v22.0/agent-states`**), **`genesys:agent_aggregate`** (OAuth2 **`client_credentials`** to **`/api/v2/analytics/users/aggregates/query`** plus optional **`/api/v2/analytics/queues/observations/query`**), **`five9:agent_state`** (SOAP **`getAgentStates`** via **`/configuration-webservices/services/v13_0_4/`**), **`talkdesk:explore_row`** (OAuth2 **Explore API** **`/data/v2/explore/queries`**), **`verint:wfm_agent_slice`** (**`/restapi/wfm/v1/`** schedule plus adherence extracts), **`aspect:wfm_json`** (**`/wfm/services/api/`** REST where deployed), **`calabrio:agent_states`** (**`/calabrio/api/v1/agents/{id}/states`** pattern), **`avaya:cms_session`** (historical_session rows landed through **Splunk DB Connect** JDBC polling Avaya CMS warehouse), **`webexcca:analytics_event`** (**Webex Contact Center Analytics REST** streams via **HEC**), **`ucce:finesse_presence`** (**Cisco Finesse REST `/finesse/api/User/{id}`** snapshots forwarded through intermediate collectors), **`dyn365:ocsession`** (**Microsoft Power Platform Dataverse Web API** **`/api/data/v9.2/msdyn_ocsessions`** replicated nightly through JDBC). Companion queue-plane feed **`business:queue_skill_hourly`** carries **`calls_offered`**, **`calls_answered_sl`**, **`asa_sec`**, **`abandon_pct`**, **`staffed_agents`**, **`avg_handle_sec`** for Erlang reconciliation (often sourced from the same warehouse DB Connect lands). Schedule truth **`lookup:wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** (dimensions **`agent_uid`**, **`day_key`**, **`scheduled_customer_seconds`**, **`actual_in_schedule_seconds`**) refreshed from **Verint Monet**, **Aspect**, or CRM-backed planners.
app: **Splunk DB Connect** ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) JDBC identities (`db_connections.conf`) pulling curated CCaaS/WFM warehouse facts into **`index=business`** on a Heavy Forwarder or Search Head pool runner; **Splunk HTTP Event Collector** (native Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud **Settings ‚Üí Data Inputs ‚Üí HTTP Event Collector**) receiving normalized **`ccaas:agent_state`** JSON from micro-batch forwarders or vendor webhook relays; optional **Splunk Add-on for Cisco Unified Contact Center** ([Splunkbase 2814](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2814)) when on-prem **UCCE/UCCX** CDR/Finesse telemetry ships through Splunk-supported bundles; optional **Splunk ITSI** ([Splunk Docs ‚Äî ITSI overview](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/ITSI/latest/IMSplunkITSI/Introduction)) KPI services referencing saved searches below for executive episode overlays.
spl:
index=business (sourcetype="ccaas:agent_state" OR sourcetype="genesys:agent_aggregate" OR sourcetype="five9:agent_state" OR sourcetype="talkdesk:explore_row") earliest=-24h@h
| eval agent_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(agent_id, agentGuid, agent_no, UserId, "")))
| eval team_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(team_id, skill_group_id, queue_group_key, GroupId, "")))
| eval sess_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(session_id, agentSessionId, SessionKey, interaction_session_key, "")))
| eval raw_state=upper(trim(tostring(coalesce(agent_state, user_state, presence_state, AgentState, ""))))
| eval canon_bucket=case(
    match(raw_state,"^(AVAILABLE|READY|IDLE|ON_QUEUE|AVAILABLE_FOR_CONTACT)$"), "available",
    match(raw_state,"^(BUSY|WORKING|INTERACTING|COMMUNICATING|ON_CALL|ROUTING)$"), "busy",
    match(raw_state,"^(AFTER[_ ]CALL[_ ]WORK|ACW|WRAP[_ ]UP)$"), "after_call_work",
    match(raw_state,"^(BREAK|REST)$"), "break",
    match(raw_state,"^(LUNCH|MEAL)$"), "lunch",
    match(raw_state,"^(TRAINING|COACHING|TUTORIAL)$"), "training",
    match(raw_state,"^(MEETING|SYNC)$"), "meeting",
    match(raw_state,"^(SYSTEM|TECH|LOGGED[_ ]OUT|UNAVAILABLE|OFFLINE)$"), "system_unavailable",
    true(), "system_unavailable")
| eval dur_s=tonumber(coalesce(duration_sec, time_in_state_seconds, dwell_seconds, interval_seconds, "0"))
| bin span=1h _time
| stats sum(eval(if(match(canon_bucket,"^(busy|after_call_work)$"),dur_s,0))) as busy_like_s,
        sum(eval(if(canon_bucket="available",dur_s,0))) as avail_s,
        sum(eval(if(canon_bucket="after_call_work",dur_s,0))) as acw_s,
        sum(eval(if(canon_bucket="busy",dur_s,0))) as busy_only_s,
        dc(sess_uid) as sessions_seen by agent_uid team_uid _time
| eval hour_bucket=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H")
| eval day_key=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d")
| lookup wfm_schedule_segments.csv agent_uid day_key OUTPUT scheduled_customer_seconds matched_inside_schedule
| eval adherence_pct=if(isnotnull(scheduled_customer_seconds) AND scheduled_customer_seconds>0, round(100*coalesce(matched_inside_schedule,0)/scheduled_customer_seconds, 3), null())
| eval denom_metrics=(busy_only_s + acw_s + avail_s)
| eval occupancy_pct=if(denom_metrics>0, round(100*((busy_only_s + acw_s)/denom_metrics), 3), null())
| eval login_denominator=(busy_like_s + avail_s)
| eval occupancy_login_pct=if(login_denominator>0, round(100*(busy_like_s/login_denominator), 3), null())
| join type=left max=0 team_uid hour_bucket [
    search index=business sourcetype="business:queue_skill_hourly" earliest=-24h@h
    | eval team_uid=trim(tostring(coalesce(skill_cluster_id, routing_team_id, "")))
    | bin span=1h _time
    | stats sum(offered_calls) as offered_calls avg(staffed_agents) as staffed_agents avg(avg_handle_sec) as avg_handle_sec avg(ans_within_thresh_pct) as vendor_sl_pct avg(abandon_pct) as abandon_pct by team_uid _time
    | eval hour_bucket=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H")
    | eval lambda_per_hour=offered_calls
    | eval traffic_erlangs=lambda_per_hour * avg_handle_sec / 3600
    | eval occupancy_erlang_pct=if(staffed_agents>0, round(100 * traffic_erlangs / staffed_agents, 3), null())
    | eval erlang_sl_thresh_sec=20
    | lookup erlang_c_sl.csv staffed_heads AS staffed_agents traffic_erlangs AS traffic_erlangs thresh_sec AS erlang_sl_thresh_sec OUTPUT sl_within_thresh_pct AS erlang_sl_pct
    | eval erlang_sl_pct=coalesce(erlang_sl_pct, vendor_sl_pct)
  ]
| fields agent_uid team_uid hour_bucket day_key occupancy_pct adherence_pct occupancy_erlang_pct occupancy_login_pct vendor_sl_pct abandon_pct traffic_erlangs lambda_per_hour erlang_sl_pct sessions_seen busy_like_s avail_s acw_s
| sort - occupancy_pct
description: Aggregates CCaaS agent-state telemetry into canonical buckets (**available**, **busy**, **after_call_work**, breaks, lunches, coaching, meetings, **system_unavailable**) using **`coalesce()`** keys across vendors, derives interval occupancy **`(busy + ACW)/(busy + ACW + available)`**, compares dwell totals against WFM schedule segments for adherence percentage, and aligns hourly staffing posture with queue-plane Erlang intensity plus ASA/abandon/vendor SL snapshots so realtime adherence dips reveal burnout-level occupancy spikes before ASA or abandon-rate alarms fire.
value: Workforce planners defend staffing budgets with Erlang **C** intensity versus staffed heads ‚Äî occupancy sits near **`traffic_erlangs/N`** when queues stabilize in the mid-seventies to **90%** band: land under **70%** and you confess over-rostered minutes; push agents past **90%** for quarters and Cornell **ILR** service-work research ties extreme load to turnover that erodes coaching time. This view links the same occupancy math to **80/20** voice service-level targets (**80%** answered inside **20** seconds per **ICMI** industry baselines), quantifying the hourly **$4‚Äì8** per-seat waste from chronic overstaffing while flagging adherence below **90%** that silently erodes predictable **SLA** attainment (sibling ticket SLAs such as **UC-23.7.1** still differ because they measure case resolution clocks, not telephony staffing).
implementation: (1) Land multi-vendor agent-state JSON or warehouse rows into **`index=business`** through **DB Connect** JDBC extracts (nightly skill-hour tables) plus **HEC** micro-batches for sub-hourly state flips; (2) publish **`wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** keyed to **`agent_uid`** with the same identifiers your WFM payroll system uses; (3) normalize reason codes vendor-by-vendor before trusting occupancy numerators; (4) schedule peak-hour saved searches every fifteen minutes with throttling on **`team_uid`** to protect integration accounts; (5) route **ITSI** or email digests when **`occupancy_pct`** exceeds **92%** for two consecutive buckets or **`adherence_pct`** drops more than twelve points beneath the prior week rolling median.
visualization: (1) **`splunk.heatmap`** ‚Äî hour-of-day √ó **`team_uid`** with cell color **`occupancy_pct`** (green **70‚Äì85%**, amber **85‚Äì90%**, red **>90%**). (2) **`splunk.line`** ‚Äî rolling **`occupancy_pct`** plus overlaid translucent target band (**70‚Äì85%**) and **`occupancy_erlang_pct`** from queue math. (3) **`splunk.gauge`** ‚Äî current **`occupancy_pct`** vs **`occupancy_erlang_pct`** paired for under/over-staff reconciliation. (4) **`splunk.table`** ‚Äî bottom decile **`adherence_pct`** by **`agent_uid`** with **`sessions_seen`** to catch single-session anomalies. (5) **`splunk.sankey`** ‚Äî inferred **`Available ‚Üí Busy ‚Üí After_Call_Work ‚Üí Break`** transitions built from sequential state pairs (`transaction` command on **`sess_uid`** sorted streams).

references.title: NICE CXone Developer ‚Äî Agent States API family
Five9 Web Services ‚Äî Configuration Web Services overview
Talkdesk Knowledge Explorer ‚Äî Explore API queries
Verint Documentation Portal ‚Äî Workforce Management REST (`/restapi/wfm/v1/`)
Cornell ILR News ‚Äî Worker turnover and customer service quality
Cornell Digital Commons ‚Äî Managing Customer Services (CAHRS working paper)
Wikipedia ‚Äî Erlang unit / Erlang C staffing commentary
ICMI ‚Äî Contact Center Trends & Benchmarks hub
Splunk Add-on for Cisco Unified Contact Center (Splunkbase 2814)

knownFalsePositives: Blended outbound dialing lifts **`busy`** dwell without inbound **`lambda_per_hour`**, so **`occupancy_pct`** climbs while Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** stays flat until you segment dialer buckets separately. Omnichannel concurrency stacks voice plus parallel chats ‚Äî naive **`busy_like_s`** sums can exceed rostered minute ceilings unless **`sess_uid`** splits concurrent contracts per modality. Supervisor-documented coaching logged only inside Learning LMS leaves **`system_unavailable`** in CCaaS while WFM marks **`scheduled_customer_ready`**, shaving adherence though productivity stayed positive. Carrier trunk seizures strand reps **`Available`** without **`busy`** ticks ‚Äî occupancy reads artificially low despite callers receiving busy-tone overflow. Precision workforce snapshots arriving ninety minutes late mis-align **`hour_bucket`** joins against streaming CCaaS slices ‚Äî adherence crosses appear until **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** timestamps reconcile ingestion offsets.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
‚Ä¢ Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or Splunk Cloud stack with **`srchIndexesAllowed`** granting **`business`** to workforce analytics roles plus separation between PI-ready extracts (`ccaas:*`) and payroll-facing JDBC identities (`dyn365:wfm_segment`).
‚Ä¢ Heavy Forwarder or scheduler capable of executing **Splunk DB Connect** (`splunk_app_db_connect`) identities through **`java.security.policy`** controlled JDBC URLs toward Snowflake / Azure Synapse / Oracle warehouses hosting CCaaS vendor snapshots.
‚Ä¢ Secrets vault integration for OAuth **`client_credentials`** used by middleware collectors hitting **NICE**, **Genesys Cloud**, **Talkdesk**, **Microsoft Dataverse**, etc.; rotate tokens shorter than vendor TTL defaults.
‚Ä¢ Capacity expectation: fifteen-second cadence **`ccaas:agent_state`** micro-batches average **6 KB**/event/agent/minute versus hourly **`business:queue_skill_hourly`** rows near **250 bytes**/skill bucket.
‚Ä¢ Governance alignment between workforce optimization (`traffic_erlangs`) and HR disciplinary uses of adherence ‚Äî publish anonymization rules before broadcasting **`agent_uid`** dashboards broadly.

Step 1 ‚Äî Configure data collection
Pipeline **A ‚Äî Warehouse-first:** Deploy **Splunk DB Connect** (Splunkbase **2686**) `db_connections.conf` stanza naming JDBC URLs such as Snowflake **`jdbc:snowflake://<account>.snowflakecomputing.com/?warehouse=WFM_WH`** or Synapse **`jdbc:sqlserver://...`**. Schedule incremental pulls (`inputs.conf` **`interval`** **900‚Äì3600** seconds) selecting **`historical_session`** columns from Avaya CMS, **`fact_agent_presence`** grain tables emitted by Five9 unload jobs, or **`explore_exports`** curated by Talkdesk DBT models ‚Äî landing sourcetypes **`five9:agent_state`**, **`talkdesk:explore_row`**, **`avaya:cms_session`** with `_time` mapped from **`segment_start_gmt`**.
Pipeline **B ‚Äî Near-real-time REST collectors:** Containerized Python forwarders authenticate via OAuth to **`https://api.incontact.com/incontactapi/services/v22.0/agent-states`** (NICE CXone) or **`https://api.mypurecloud.com/api/v2/analytics/users/aggregates/query`** (Genesys Cloud) every **60‚Äì120** seconds. Serialize canonical payloads (`agent_uid`, `team_uid`, `sess_uid`, `agent_state`, `duration_sec`) before POST through Splunk **HTTP Event Collector** tokens scoped to **`ccaas:agent_state`**.
Pipeline **C ‚Äî Hybrid ERP schedules:** Pull **Dynamics 365 Customer Service** Omnichannel **`msdyn_ocsession`** slices via Power Automate nightly CSV drops ingested through **`dyn365:wfm_segment`** sourcetype or via DB Connect pulling **`ScheduledDuration`** derivations aligned with payroll calendars.
Publish **`lookup:wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** with reviewer **`checksum_sha256`** stored beside lookup definitions (`transforms.conf`). Ensure **`segment_start_local`** strings carry explicit **`America/Chicago`** offsets (`%z`) before Splunk parses ‚Äî ambiguous timestamps wreck adherence denominators.
Optional **Splunk Add-on for Cisco UCCE/UCCX** (**2814**) when UC telemetry arrives through Splunk-supported Cisco bundles ‚Äî route **`ucce:finesse_presence`** into the same **`agent_uid`** namespace via **`props.conf`** **`FIELDALIAS`** merging **`PeripheralID`**.

Step 2 ‚Äî Create the search and alert
Operational SPL intentionally separates denominator philosophies: **`occupancy_pct`** honors **`busy + ACW + available`** productive routing windows while **`occupancy_login_pct`** mirrors **`(busy + ACW)/(busy + ACW + available)`** variants requested by legacy Erlang spreadsheets ‚Äî twin outputs prevent finance debates.
Primary adherence math reads **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** and **`matched_inside_schedule`** via **`lookup wfm_schedule_segments.csv`** aligned to payroll identifiers; when planners publish only interval flags, pivot to **`sum(eval(if(in_schedule="Y",dur_s,0)))`** collectors against Aspect **`/wfm/services/api/`** payloads instead of CSV rows.
Queue-plane **`join`** pulls **`business:queue_skill_hourly`** metrics (`offered_calls`, **`staffed_agents`**, **`avg_handle_sec`**) so **`traffic_erlangs = Œª √ó AHT / 3600`** aligns with **`occupancy_erlang_pct ‚âà traffic_erlangs √∑ staffed_agents`** ‚Äî deviation bigger than eight points flags denominator mismatch between CCaaS counts and WFM roster totals.
Ship **`lookup erlang_c_sl.csv`** (columns **`staffed_heads`**, **`traffic_erlangs`**, **`thresh_sec`**, **`sl_within_thresh_pct`**) populated offline from authoritative Erlang calculators or IT analytics tooling ‚Äî the SPL consumes those engineered probabilities alongside **`vendor_sl_pct`** fallback rows pulled straight from vendor queue snapshots.
Configure alerts with **`trigger.threshold`** **`occupancy_pct>92`** AND **`traffic_erlangs/staffed_agents < 0.78`** (meaning latent inbound slack exists yet agents remain overloaded due to shrink mis-tags) routing to **`wf_analytics`** Slack channel with **`suppress`** **`team_uid`** four hours.

Step 3 ‚Äî Validate
Hourly reconciliation drill: export vendor supervisor cockpit (**Genesys CX Analytics**, **NICE Central**, **Five9 Supervisor**) totals for **`Occupancy`** / **`Schedule Adherence`** on identical **`team_uid`** slices ‚Äî Splunk deltas above **¬±4** percentage points trigger **`props`** investigations before trusting Splunk payroll proofs.
Cross-check Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** against automated workforce **`Forecasted Agents`** spreadsheet row using identical **`lambda`** definitions ‚Äî mismatched **`calls_offered`** filters (including **`abandoned`** vs **`answered`** numerator choices) explain predictable nightly drift.
Validate **`sess_uid`** cardinality (`dc(sess_uid)` versus concurrent **`logged_in`** counts). Persistent **`sessions_seen`** triple workforce roster implies duplicate ingestion tenants (**Disney**, **Apple**, enterprise isolation duplicates).
Perform **`makeresults`** replay tests feeding synthetic **`ccaas:agent_state`** sequences through **`transaction`** harness verifying **`splunk.sankey`** **Available‚ÜíBusy‚ÜíAfter_Call_work** arcs mirror vendor supervisor timelines.
Certify **`hour_bucket`** joins against **`strftime`** UTC boundaries versus supervisor consoles localized ‚Äî mismatched **`DST`** transitions spotlight ingestion timezone bugs faster than SLA retrospectives.

Step 4 ‚Äî Operationalize
Dashboard Studio layout (‚ÄúWorkforce posture ‚Äî occupancy vs Erlang‚Äù) stacks heatmap row (**Peak occupancy footprint**) atop paired gauges (**Actual occupancy vs Erlang occupancy**) plus **`splunk.line`** overlays referencing **`vendor_sl_pct`** from **`business:queue_skill_hourly`**.
Embed **`splunk.table`** adherence outliers filtered **`sessions_seen>12`** to suppress trainees flagged once.
Weekly cadence: Monday **`wf_capacity_review`** ritual compares **`occupancy_pct`** rolling averages versus shrink-adjusted hiring plans (`README-wfm.md`).
Executive appendix attaches **`splunk.sankey`** exports packaged into PDF alongside CFO staffing variance commentary referencing Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** deltas quarter-over-quarter.
Automation hooks: **`phantom`**/`SOAR` playbook triggers coaching backlog **`learning`** LMS assignments whenever **`adherence_pct`** breaches minus twelve-point swing relative trailing median ‚Äî narrative cites Cornell **`ILR`** turnover risk framing rather than punitive surveillance tone.

Step 5 ‚Äî Troubleshooting
1) Mid-shift voluntary rest captured inside CCaaS **`Unavailable`** without matching WFM auxiliary codes duplicates adherence misses until **`reason_code`** normalization maps **REST/BREAK** synonyms.
2) Outbound blended queues tally **`busy`** talk-time toward occupancy though Erlang numerator excludes outbound **`lambda`** ‚Äî bifurcate **`campaign_direction`** dimensions prior comparing **`occupancy_pct`** versus **`traffic_erlangs`**.
3) Concurrent chat sessions multiply productive seconds relative to roster minutes ‚Äî enforce modality-aware **`busy_like_s`** caps equal to contractual concurrency ceilings.
4) **`after_call_work`** forced wrap timers truncate differently (**Genesys Cloud** sixty-second hard-stop versus **Talkdesk** CRM-trigger release) causing ACW drift across vendors ‚Äî harmonize **`duration_sec`** ingestion windows.
5) Supervisor mentoring flagged **`Unavailable`** though KPI frameworks treat mentorship as productive ‚Äî exclude **`reason_code=MentorCoach`** from adherence penalties via governance-approved **`eval`** masks.
6) PSTN outages leaving agents **`Available`** without inbound **`busy`** ticks distort occupancy downward though Erlang **`traffic_erlangs`** collapses simultaneously ‚Äî correlate **`carrier_health`** feeds.
7) Global campuses crossing **`UTC`** midnight shift bids yield **`hour_bucket`** collisions until **`segment_start_local`** normalized via **`strftime`** with **`%Z`** offsets tied to agent home zones.
8) Weekly roster swaps failing replication between Aspect planner UI and JDBC pulls produce stale **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** ‚Äî freshness probes via Splunk introspection searches against scheduled lookup inputs guard adherence compares.
9) Voluntary overtime extending beyond roster **`scheduled_customer_seconds`** counts inflates adherence numerators differently per vendor overtime policies ‚Äî annotate **`actual_overlap`** semantics nightly.
10) Callback reservation states pin **`Available`** without live **`busy`** interactions ‚Äî subtract **`callback_hold`** tagged intervals before **`occupancy_pct`** averages.
11) Payroll **`unpaid`** lunches (**45** minute WFM) diverge from CCaaS **`30`** minute **`lunch`** dwell splits ‚Äî reconcile dual calendars before accusing chronic over-adherence.
12) Skill-based routing **`reject`** outcomes oscillate **`busy`** versus **`available`** depending on **`RING_NO_ANSWER`** vendor semantics ‚Äî codify **`RING`** sequences via **`transaction`** diagnostics.
13) Enterprise tenant isolation duplicates (**Disney**, **Apple**, Microsoft EA estates) replicate **`team_uid`** identifiers across child orgs ‚Äî prepend **`tenant_code`** inside **`eval team_uid`**.
14) **`Genesys Cloud`** distinguishing **`COMMUNICATING`** versus **`INTERACTING`** splits inbound answered versus outbound dialing contexts ‚Äî remap labels prior benchmarking occupancy versus **`traffic_erlangs`**.
grandmaExplanation: We watch phone-queue staffing like air-traffic control: people should be ready when calls arrive, stick to the shift plan so buses stay predictable, yet avoid cramming folks past ninety-percent occupancy because burnout creeps in fast.
